name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ApplyBulletImpulseHelper.ExtraShare
summary: If not 0.0 then have an extra bullet applied to spine0 (approximates the COM).  Uses setup from configureBulletsExtra.  0-1 shared 0.0 = no extra bullet, 0.5 = impulse split equally between extra and bullet,  1.0 only extra bullet.  LT 0.0 then bullet + scaled extra bullet.  Eg.-0.5 = bullet + 0.5 impulse extra bullet.
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = -2.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
